fs.notes: The shared sync fs bridge is cataloged here to document overlap with future WinterTC-style profiles, but no WinterTC fs surface is claimed yet.

crypto.notes: The current WinterTC crypto profile covers randomUUID, getRandomValues, stable subtle object identity, Promise-backed subtle.digest over the SHA digest family, Promise-backed HMAC generateKey/importKey/exportKey/sign/verify over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed AES-GCM generateKey/importKey/exportKey/encrypt/decrypt over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed AES-CTR generateKey/importKey/exportKey/encrypt/decrypt over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed AES-CBC generateKey/importKey/exportKey/encrypt/decrypt over raw and jwk key formats with PKCS#7 padding, Promise-backed AES-KW generateKey/importKey/exportKey over raw and jwk key formats, Promise-backed subtle.wrapKey/subtle.unwrapKey using AES-KW over the raw and jwk formats wrapping HMAC and AES-GCM/CTR/CBC/KW inner keys, Promise-backed PBKDF2 raw import plus deriveBits/deriveKey to HMAC, AES-GCM, AES-CTR, and AES-CBC, and Promise-backed HKDF raw import plus deriveBits/deriveKey to HMAC, AES-GCM, AES-CTR, and AES-CBC. Other subtle algorithms remain pending.
